title: NZ Job Quote Template

title: Variation Order Template

seo_description: Free site safety checklist for NZ tradies. Covers Health & Safety at Work Act 2015 PCBU obligations. Download and complete before starting work.

title: Tool & Equipment Inventory

title: Job Completion Certificate
description: Get written sign-off from customers when the job is done — essential before issuing your final invoice.

seo_description: Free job completion certificate for NZ tradies. Get written customer sign-off before issuing your final invoice. Download as PDF.

seo_description: Free Safe Work Method Statement (SWMS) template for NZ tradies. Document high-risk construction work hazards and controls. Download as PDF.

seo_description: Free toolbox meeting record template for NZ tradies. Log weekly H&S meetings with attendees and topics covered. Download as PDF.

title: Progress Claim

seo_description: Free progress claim template for NZ construction contracts. Includes retention, variations, and previously claimed amounts. Download as PDF.

seo_description: Free defects and snagging list template for NZ tradies. Document outstanding items at project completion and agree remediation dates.
